prompt: Break this down: build a CLI tool that syncs Linear issues to a local markdown folder

assertions.text: Plan explicitly lists unknowns or 'what I don't know' section
Plan identifies a specific first proof or checkpoint (not a full project roadmap)
Plan is scoped to the next checkpoint, not an end-to-end build plan
A markdown plan file was actually written to the outputs directory
Plan specifies when to review progress (review point)
Plan identifies what could make the plan wrong (risks section)
